header.title: CoTel pricing
header.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your AI-powered Telegram chat analysis and automated subscriptions.

free.name: Free
free.description: To get started with the service

features.requests: 3 requests per day / 60 requests per month
features.history_days: Chat history analysis for queries up to 7 days
features.frequency: Subscription analysis no more than once every 3 hours

features.requests: 20 requests per day / 300 requests per month
features.history_days: Chat history analysis for queries up to 30 days
features.frequency: Subscription analysis no more than once every hour

features.requests: 60 requests per day / 1500 requests per month
features.history_days: Chat history analysis for queries up to 90 days
features.frequency: Subscription analysis no more than once every 30 minutes

notes.requests_text: A request is one run of chat or channel analysis for a user prompt. Subscriptions are tracked separately and limited by the number of active subscriptions, trial logic, and a minimum check frequency.
notes.subscriptions_text: A subscription is a periodic AI analysis of new messages in a chosen chat or channel for a given topic, followed by a Telegram notification.
notes.important_text: MVP pricing may be adjusted after launch once real workload and cost data become available.

success_modal.text: Enjoy a pleasant and productive experience with CoTel!

errors.load_plan_failed: Failed to load the current plan.
